scripts.dev:frontend: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f backend/.env ] && . backend/.env; [ -f .env ] && . .env; set +a; npm run dev --workspace=frontend'
scripts.db:apply-schema: docker exec -i terratrace-postgres psql -U terratrace -d terratrace -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 < db/init/001_schema.sql
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
